optimizedPersistentScreenshot.settleMode: explicit seek plus synchronous style flush

encoderFinding: At 640x360, libx264 encoded the raw fixture in 0.13 seconds while h264_videotoolbox took 0.58 seconds because hardware startup dominated. Hardware selection should remain resolution- and workload-aware.
claimBoundary: The raw callback sequence is a live CEF probe, not yet the deterministic externally scheduled production renderer. Direct IOSurface-to-wgpu import and texture-native hardware encoding remain future milestones.
